channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large pothole on road entrance to 373 Old Farm Avenue. DA158AA. ld, 3rd March
item.description:
Pothole has been getting wider and deeper over past month causing damage to car wheels

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 338, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitis on window frames, 3rd March
item.description:
There are still some white graffitis on black window frames (1 on hoxton square side, 2 on coronet street side) on ground level.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 3rd March
item.description:
Illegal parking GL73 AFV

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Maidstone Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking view, 3rd March
item.description:
This van is parked infrount house no 91 and 93 since nearly two months , I am having deficulty taking my car from driveway blocking view .

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food and rubbish under street light, 3rd March
item.description:
Some people has dumped rubbish on pavement in corner of Salisbury Close Se17 1ny

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-28, Salisbury Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gaps in asphalt sections of road - vibration is causing serious problems, 3rd March
item.description:
Each time a vehicle passes by our house the front rooms shake ! The doors especially so - this has been disturbing my sleep and my roost child's sleep for a long time now. The vibration caused by vehicles passing over the gaps in the asphalt additions of the road is unacceptable . This problem has been reported in the past but no improvements have been made. This has now been going on for years and we would like a solution to the problem .thank you in advance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Kedleston Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 3rd March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chailey Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Fly tipping down their own alleyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iron Mill Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture in the pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
Someone is leaving furniture close to our recycling bins. I’ve already cleaned and disposed what left so many times but people are still leaving old furniture outside in the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Ancaster Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in toad, 3rd March
item.description:
Moved to outside our house 71a Malmains Way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Brabourne Rise, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dumped rubbish, 3rd March
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped again as well as now accumulating in the alley way. The council contacted me before saying it would be removed but it is still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged dropped curb, 3rd March
item.description:
Hello, we had a dropped curb installed last year and we currently have road closures and works taking pace down our road. I came home from work one day and found that our dropped curb had been damaged. This is outside of number 9 Saxville Road BR5 3AN. Please can you assist in getting this repaired. Many thanks, Hannah

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Saxville Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car being repaired on highway, 3rd March
item.description:
Car parked creating access issues. Parked for 2.months with movement and now wheels off and on jack's since Sunday. Causes issues for passing cars and access to driveway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa, 3rd March
item.description:
Armchair dumped approx 10 days ago - outside 14/15 York grove, SE15

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Grove, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Street light not working, 3rd March
item.description:
Light not working F74

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Weighton Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Builders waste and van blocking pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
32 Royal Hill - builders are blocking pavement and road - has been there all day and this evening also forcing people onto a busy road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Royal Hill, Greenwich

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, front of 56-60 (Lidl). Non-offensive tags on cabinet, 3rd March
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Lights not working on Thames path, 3rd March
item.description:
The lights on the Thames path are not working. It’s very dark in this place.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Flats 1-12, Edward Square, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: Dumped bed base, 3rd March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Porchester Mead, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Bin not been emptied, 3rd March
item.description:
Please empty this bin Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
